summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jasper legal tech platform MVP. Backend APIs are functional with minor status code issue. Frontend authentication, routing, and UI elements working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Create case returns 200 instead of 201 status code
Google OAuth button not found on signup page (only traditional form)
minor_bugs.impact: Users can only sign up via form, not Google OAuth

passed_tests: Public lawyers API with seeded data (6 lawyers found)
Login page renders with Jasper branding and Google OAuth
Protected routes correctly redirect to login
Dashboard loads with valid session and shows stats
Signup page renders with plan selection (Free $0/month, Pro $99/month)
Navigation protection works across all routes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor status code issue in cases API (return 201 for POST /api/cases). Consider adding Google OAuth button to signup page for consistency.
